steps.t: You should talk to Arandol, who can be found by the statue at the after-battle Cross-roads.
The statue is at the after-battle Cross-roads. You should remove the Orkish poles placed around the Statue of the Fallen King.
The statue is at the after-battle Cross-roads. You should break the defiled head upon the Statue of the Fallen King.
The statue is at the after-battle Cross-roads. You should retrieve the original head of the Statue of the Fallen King.
The statue is at the after-battle Cross-roads. You should place the original head upon the Statue of the Fallen King.
You should talk to Arandol, who can be found at the after-battle Cross-roads.
